items.name: Base Armor Repair
items.description: Restore hull integrity to the grounded hangar. Each purchase restores 1 armor up to the maximum.

items.name: Transmission Array
items.description: Complete the array to unlock sending a distress call from the dock.

items.name: Mini Defense Turret
items.description: Purchase a defense tower license. After buying, press T while flying to place the turret in the world.

items.name: Medium Defense Turret
items.description: Purchase a defense tower license (medium tier art; same placement flow as mini until tiers are split in code).

items.name: Mega Defense Turret
items.description: Purchase a defense tower license (mega tier art; same placement flow as mini until tiers are split in code).
